creator: nik@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, Jan 07, 2000 at 02:20:35PM +1100, jsutton@bbcon.com.au wrote:
> >Number:         15958
> >Category:       docs
> >Synopsis:       Mice section for doc/en_US.ISO_8859-1/books/handbook/hw/
> >Description:
> 
> 	Here's a patch to add a reasonable starting point for the Mice 
> 	section of the Hardware Compatibility List. Could someone please
> 	commit it if it checks out? This is my first attempt at submitting 
> 	documentation so please be verbose about any errors that I've made.

Making the changes to my local tree now, so they'll be committed in the
next 24 hours or so.  I only had to make a couple of changes.  A few 
were related to indentation, and I changed it to use double spaces after 
the periods.

Other than that, great.  Thanks very much.

N
